subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon the Herald hath cried out before the faces of men: "The Kingdom belongeth unto God, the Lord of all worlds!" The Ocean hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه نادی المناد امام وجوه العباد الملک لله رب العالمین قد ظهر البحر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power of the Manifestation of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @suffering and imprisonment
